hero.title: Course Tracker
hero.description: Create courses, organize modules, log learning progress, and review completion.

flow.title: Create Course → Manage Modules → Track Progress → Review Completion
steps: Create a course with provider, goal, and dates
Add ordered modules for the course
Log learning sessions against courses or modules
Review module completion, minutes, and recent progress

differences.title: Keep courses connected to learning activity
differences.description: Course Tracker turns a course commitment into modules, progress logs, and a completion review inside the Ansiversa shell.

items.title: Courses
items.description: Create current-user course records with provider, category, goal, dates, and status.

items.title: Modules
items.description: Break each course into ordered modules and update module status as learning moves forward.

items.title: Review
items.description: Use progress logs to see learning minutes, completion rate, and recent course activity.

feel.title: A practical course control panel
feel.description: The workflow keeps courses, modules, and learning logs in one focused workspace.

items.title: Create the course
items.description: Define the learning commitment and the outcome you want.

items.title: Manage modules
items.description: Track each section of the course with clear status.

items.title: Review completion
items.description: Check completion rate, learning minutes, and recent progress logs.

audiences.title: Who uses Course Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for students, online learners, and professionals managing structured courses.

items.title: Students
items.description: Manage classes, modules, and course progress.

resourceSection.title: Course tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed for the Course Tracker review workflow.

items.title: Courses
items.description: Create protected course records with goals, dates, and status.

items.title: Course modules
items.description: Add ordered modules under courses and update progress status.

items.title: Progress logs
items.description: Record minutes, summaries, and reflections for completion review.

groupedSection.title: Move from setup to completion review
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for course setup, module management, and progress review.

items.name: Courses
items.description: Create a course around a clear learning goal.

items.name: Modules
items.description: Break the course into ordered learning units.

items.name: Progress logs
items.description: Record learning minutes, summaries, and reflections.

items.name: Completion review
items.description: See completion rate, total minutes, and recent logs.

technicalSection.title: Workflow-ready for Astra review
technicalSection.description: Course Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and remains unapproved until Astra and Partner review are complete.
items: Current-user owned Courses, CourseModules, and CourseProgressLogs tables.
Typed React service layer, Zustand store, and responsive module routes.

finalCta.title: Open Course Tracker
finalCta.description: Create a course and start tracking modules and progress.
